name: Guangdong Senssun Weighing Apparatus Group Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Senssun Weighing Apparatus Group Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of medium- to high-end weighing apparatuses for home and commercial use, and health and movement measurement products. It operates through Measuring Devices, Weighing Apparatuses, and Health and Movement Information Measurement Products segments. The company's products include price computing scales, electronic platform scales, digital weighing scales, dial spring scales, weighing indicators, smart personal scales, activity trackers, baby scales, body analyzers, kitchen scales, body fat scales, luggage scales, and health monitor scales. It operates in China, Europe, North America, and Southeast Asia. Guangdong Senssun Weighing Apparatus Group Ltd. sells its products through a network of own stores, electronic channels, and retail chains, as well as direct selling facilities. The company was formerly known as Senssun Weighing Apparatus Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Senssun Weighing Apparatus Group Ltd. in January 2008. Guangdong Senssun Weighing Apparatus Group Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Zhongshan, China.
